pageTitle: Trex Composite Decks for Kauai Homes
metaTitle: Trex Deck Builder Kauai | Composite Deck Installation | Ad Value Home Improvement
metaDescription: Expert Trex composite deck installation on Kauai. Low maintenance, splinter-free, and built for Hawaii. Railings, stairs, and custom designs. Free estimates.
subtitle: The low-maintenance deck that handles Hawaii's climate — and looks beautiful doing it.
intro: Trex composite decking is one of the best investments a Kauai homeowner can make. Unlike natural wood, Trex won't rot, warp, or splinter — critical advantages in Hawaii's humid, UV-intense environment. Ad Value Home Improvement has extensive experience installing Trex decking systems, including railings and fascia, to create a complete, beautiful outdoor living space.

highlights.title: UV & Moisture Resistant
highlights.description: Trex is engineered to resist fading, staining, and mold growth — perfect for Kauai's tropical conditions.

highlights.title: Low Maintenance
highlights.description: No staining, sealing, or sanding required. Just an occasional wash to keep it looking new.

highlights.title: Eco-Friendly Material
highlights.description: Trex is made from 95% recycled material — a responsible choice for Hawaii's environment.

highlights.title: Color & Style Options
highlights.description: Dozens of colors and grain patterns to match your home's aesthetic and your personal style.

imageAlt: Composite-style deck surface with modern outdoor seating
schemaDescription: Certified Trex composite deck installation on Kauai. Low maintenance, beautiful, and built to last in Hawaii's climate.
